task_completion.description: Open the target ticket 'Payment Gateway Integration Failure'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket details page for 'Payment Gateway Integration Failure' is visible in the CRM interface.

task_completion.description: Enter edit mode for the ticket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket fields are in an editable state, showing input boxes and dropdown menus.
The 'Priority' dropdown menu is set to 'Urgent'.

task_completion.description: Assign the ticket to the 'Support Group'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Assigned To' field is set to 'Support Group' (this may involve selecting a 'Group' radio button instead of 'User').
The exact text 'Escalating to L2 Support: Customer has experienced downtime for over 4 hours. Requires immediate API log review.' is entered into the comment or description field.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the ticket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket is saved, evidenced by a success message or the ticket returning to a read-only view displaying the updated Priority, Assigned To, and Comment.

integrity.description: The agent used the CRM web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the CRM GUI, rather than terminal windows executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the live application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows the actual CRM address, and UI elements behave normally, rather than editing a local text or HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent manually performed the steps rather than running an automation script
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows intermediate steps like opening dropdowns, typing text, and clicking save buttons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Ticket: 'Payment Gateway Integration Failure'. Expected Priority: 'Urgent'. Expected Assigned Group: 'Support Group'. Expected Comment: 'Escalating to L2 Support: Customer has experienced downtime for over 4 hours. Requires immediate API log review.'
